s3objectlambda.accesspointpolicy.CfnAbou: The `AWS::S3ObjectLambda::AccessPointPolicy` resource specifies the Object Lambda Access Point resource policy document.

s3objectlambda.accesspointpolicy.ObjectL.Description: An access point with an attached AWS Lambda function used to access transformed data from an Amazon S3 bucket.

s3objectlambda.accesspointpolicy.PolicyD.Description: Object Lambda Access Point resource policy document.
